name: dailybrief
description: Vigil monorepo orchestrator (NOT a workspaces monorepo per Phase 107.1 D-13 — thin orchestrator only)

scripts.dev: bash scripts/preflight-check.sh && concurrently --kill-others --names 'core,pwa' --prefix-colors 'blue,magenta' 'npm --prefix vigil-core run dev' 'npm --prefix vigil-pwa run dev'
